name: Voltage Monitor (min/max/avg)
Voltage Table
format:
⚡ CFW900 — DC Bus Voltage

DeviceNow (V)Min (V)Max (V)Avg (V)Status
{{v.name}} {{v.now.toFixed(1)}} {{v.min.toFixed(1)}} {{v.max.toFixed(1)}} {{v.avg}} {{v.alarm ? 'ALARM' : 'OK'}}

Thresholds: Low = 350V | High = 750V

⚡ SSW900 — Motor Voltage

DeviceNow (V)Min (V)Max (V)Avg (V)Imbal %Status
{{v.name}} {{v.now.toFixed(1)}} {{v.min.toFixed(1)}} {{v.max.toFixed(1)}} {{v.avg}} {{v.deviation}}% {{v.alarm ? 'ALARM' : 'OK'}}

Thresholds: Low = 400V | High = 480V | Max Imbalance = 5%
